default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO/LLM competitive analysis and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Competitive Analysis:** GrowthX will deliver a baseline SEO analysis by EOD Monday, Feb 23, comparing Parloa to core competitors (Sierra, Cognigy, Decagon, PolyAI).](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**LLM Tracking:** To enable LLM tracking, William will draft custom CheckDat prompts today for Dora's approval, targeting a data baseline by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Parloa will focus on two narratives—"Great Divided" (AI pilot-to-scale gap) and "IVR, RPI" (AI vs. rule-based IVRs)—to address board scrutiny on digital pipeline performance.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Author Authority:** To boost SEO, Parloa will add expert author bios to all content, establishing credibility for Google's crawlers.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

## Topics

### Board Scrutiny & Performance Metrics

  - [**Context:** Digital pipeline generation is a key focus for the board, leading to close scrutiny and questions on SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [**Challenge:** A board member's focus on vanity metrics (e.g., traffic volume) conflicts with Parloa's goal of tracking target account engagement and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [**Action:** William offered to field questions directly from the board member to provide expert context.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

### Competitive Analysis & Forecasting

  - [**Goal:** Analyze Parloa's SEO and LLM performance against core competitors: Sierra, Cognigy, Decagon, and PolyAI.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**SEO Analysis (Due: EOD Mon, Feb 23):**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** A baseline report on current SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Data Sources:** GSC, GA, and SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Scope:** Analysis will backtrack to Jan 25, 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**LLM Tracking (CheckDat):**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Blocker:** No custom prompts are currently configured in CheckDat.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Path Forward:** William will draft prompts today → Dora will approve → William will implement → Tracking begins.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Timeline:** This process enables a data baseline to be available by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [**SEO Growth Forecast (Due: Next Thurs, Feb 26):**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** A preliminary forecast of organic search traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a first version, acknowledging the project is only in its fifth week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Content Strategy & Author Authority

  - [**New Content Narratives:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [**"Great Divided":** The gap between AI pilots and scaled implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
          - [**Angle:** Why \~60% of AI projects fail to scale, and how successful implementation is critical for CIO careers.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [**"IVR, RPI":** AI vs. rule-based IVRs.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
          - [**Angle:** 90% of companies still use rule-based IVRs despite AI's potential, based on a Parloa report.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [**Author Authority for SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Problem:** Current author tags lack the context needed to signal expertise to Google's crawlers.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add a short, expert-focused bio for each author.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This establishes credibility, a key factor for SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Bios should highlight relevant experience (e.g., "Scaled a short-term rental management company"). This applies even to former employees.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Content Production & Reporting

  - [**Article Reviews:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [Dora will review two articles sent on Slack to enable publication this week.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [Five additional articles will be delivered for review by EOD tomorrow, Feb 20.](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [**Looker Studio Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/4wGRgNVyV4GAy5LHWexnLQxKx2Ph2dfZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
